TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Takinusta ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 113 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 108 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 79%, Amis 9%, Paywan 2%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Takinusta hya' ga Likau-uan. tay mkyahu' na Takinusta hya' ga Haitutuan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takinusta ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takinusta ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na takinus~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa likau-uan. taj mkjaħuʔ na takinus~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa ħaitutuan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Takinusta ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 113 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 108 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 79%, Amis 9%, Paywan 2%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Takinusta hya' ga Likau-uan. tay mkyahu' na Takinusta hya' ga Haitutuan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Takinusta ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Takinusta ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na takinus~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa likau-uan. taj mkjaħuʔ na takinus~ɕta ħjaʔ ɣa ħaitutuan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ takinus~ɕta ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
